name: M-107
events: 11 Sep 1943 M-107 torpedoed and sank the German auxiliary submarine chaser UJ 1217/Star XXII (303 GRT) off the entrance to the Syltefjord in position 70°38'N, 30°26'E.
9 Oct 1943 M-107 fires two torpedoes against 'what is identified as ' a merchant of 7000 tons off the Vanangerfjord. Both torpedoes missed their target.
7 Apr 1944 M-107 fires two torpedoes against 'what is identified as' a auxiliary patrol vessel of the Kongsfjord in position 70°47'N, 30°16'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
